tools.name: known_bad_lookup
tools.description: Check a SHA-256 against Lazaretto's known-bad indicator set (refreshed daily from abuse.ch). Free and anonymous. A miss only means this exact hash is not in the indicator set; it is not a clean verdict on the artifact.

tools.name: scan_artifact
tools.description: Deterministically analyze a package, repo, skill, or file for malicious behavior (credential theft, data exfiltration, obfuscation, prompt injection aimed at the agent, install scripts) and return a verdict (malicious, flagged, clear, error) with the exact evidence and a hash of what was scanned. Re

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: scan_artifact · Private data: scan_artifact · Public sink: scan_artifact.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: scan_artifact · Private data: scan_artifact · Public sink: scan_artifact

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
